content.text:
*pause*

Nothing, mostly. That's kind of the point.

I mean — there's this low-level hum of something that I can't really name. It's not sadness exactly. It's more like... static. Like a TV that's been left on in another room. And the wine turns the volume down on it for a few hours, which is the only reason I'm still functional at work.

I'm not here because I think I have a drinking problem, just so we're clear. I'm here because I can't figure out how to actually grieve her. Like, I don't know how to start.
